# Roof Monsters — llms.txt
# https://roofmonsters.co
# Family-owned Tampa Bay roofing contractor since 1988 (Dunedin, FL HQ)

> Roof Monsters (DBA Terrance McKeever Enterprises, Inc.) provides residential and commercial roofing across Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, Hillsborough, and Manatee County, Florida. Atlas-only installs, free inspections, private-pay storm/emergency repair. Does not offer insurance claim filing or adjuster coordination services.

## Primary site
- Production: https://roofmonsters.co
- Staging (GitHub Pages): https://roof-monsters.github.io/roof-monsters/
- AI facts: /ai.txt

## Contact / CTA
- Phone: (727) 439-3869
- Email: info@roofmonsters.co
- Address: 1391 Robin Hood Ln, Dunedin, FL 34698
- Contact form: /contact-us/
- Soft trust: most work comes from referrals; clear written estimates; family-owned since 1988

- Home: /

- /services/roof-ventilation/

## Materials & warranty
- Atlas Designer Shingles / Scotchgard on qualifying projects
- Atlas materials sometimes available (installer; do not claim certified dealer unless confirmed)
- 15-year Roof Monsters workmanship warranty on qualifying installs
- Atlas manufacturer coverage per product terms

## Licensing
- Roofing: CCC1335398, CCC052490
- Building: CBC015719

## Build / deploy notes
- Sitemap: `python scripts/build-sitemap.py --base production`
- SEO meta: `python scripts/apply-seo.py`
- Locations: `python scripts/build-location-pages.py` then `python scripts/build-header-nav.py`
- New service pages: `python scripts/build-service-pages.py`
